title: Solving Chaotic Workflows with Monday.com

posts.author: Carlawizz (Carla)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all—I’ve been struggling with chaotic project management and I know a lot of people here have been too.

I spent some time working through it last week, and here’s a simple way I solved it for less than $10/m:

  1. Automate task management and workflow tracking using Make. You can set up custom automations to move tasks between project boards and trigger actions based on deadlines or updates, making everything run smoothly without manual input.
  2. Integrate AI tools like ChatGPT or similar to assist in generating summaries, reports, or answering common questions about the project status. This saves time and ensures you’re on top of everything, even without constant monitoring.
  3. Use a project management tool like monday.com to keep everything organized and visible. Integrate it with your automations and AI for smooth data flow.

If anything is unclear, let me know. Hope this helps you
